summary: Fresh post-repair verification confirms that the health monitor now watches the newly explicit active jobs and still reports only the real remaining marketing verification failure instead of inventing extra health. This is a pass on monitor truthfulness, not a claim that the whole system is green.

verified_repairs.claim: health_monitor.py now includes marketing-research-daily, marketing-daily, and Push research findings to git repo in KEY_JOBS.
verified_repairs.details: Direct source inspection shows all three active jobs are now part of the health monitor key-job set.

verified_repairs.claim: Direct rerun still produces a truthful latest-state artifact after the coverage expansion.
verified_repairs.details: health_monitor_latest.json now shows jobs_checked=19, issues_found=1, and the only reported issue is the real marketing independent-verification failure.

remaining_blockers: The monitor remains correctly red on marketing because agents/marketing/logs/marketing_loop_independent_verification.json still has verdict=fail.
This verification pass covered monitor truthfulness after the repair; the marketing owner loop itself still needs substantive repair before the overall system can go green.

evidence.summary: KEY_JOBS now includes marketing-research-daily, marketing-daily, and Push research findings to git repo.
Latest direct run records jobs_checked=19 and only one issue: loop_verification_fail on the marketing independent verification artifact.
Current marketing independent verifier verdict is fail.
